composition.Programmer 1: Fix and enhance main.py backend application for OnlineAuction web application. Specifically, ensure all Flask routes correctly serve the required pages as per the detailed page design in the requirements. Fix the issue where the dashboard() function fails due to missing 'dashboard.html' template by coordinating with Programmer 2 who will implement all required HTML templates. Ensure data reading functions correctly parse local text files in 'data' directory and that all routes pass correct data to templates. Maintain the root route '/' to serve the Dashboard page as the first page. Validate that all page routes handle errors gracefully and support the features described in the requirements document.
composition.Programmer 2: Implement all required HTML template files for the OnlineAuction web application in the Flask 'templates' directory. This includes creating 'dashboard.html' and all other templates corresponding to the nine pages  Auction Catalog, Auction Details, Place Bid, Bid History, Auction Categories, Winners, Trending Auctions, and Auction Status. Each template must include the specified elements with correct IDs and types as per the requirements document, support dynamic data rendering from the backend, and provide navigation buttons as described. Ensure templates are well-structured, user-friendly, and compatible with Flask's render_template function to prevent TemplateNotFound errors.
